design_philosophy: A creator's sketchbook for weird little games. Cozy, draft-y, playful, handmade. Avoid corporate or Fisher-Price looks.

headings.usage: Hero and display headings. Gives a slightly old-school print feel.

mono.usage: Numbers, JSON previews, economy values, configs.

handwriting.usage: Sparingly for sketchbook labels, sticky notes, doodle captions.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-fraunces text-[#2F2A24]
scale.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-fraunces text-[#2F2A24]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous, organic spacing. Elements should feel placed rather than rigidly snapped, using generous padding and slight rotations.
spacing_and_layout.scale: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid tight, dense groupings unless it's a code block.

structure.main_canvas: Notebook style. Use a repeating radial-gradient for a subtle dot-grid paper texture background over #F8F1DF.
structure.navigation: Notebook tabs at the top of the canvas, distinct from standard web nav.
structure.sidebar: Project Tray on the left. Style it like the edge of a folder with paper-clipped assets.
structure.drawer: Mod-Mate AI Companion slides in from the right. Style it like a spiral notepad or a clipboard.

surfaces_and_textures.background_texture: A faint dot-grid pattern. Example Tailwind class strategy: bg-[radial-gradient(#D8C8A8_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:20px_20px]

borders.wobbly: Use rounded-[255px_15px_225px_15px/15px_225px_15px_255px] to simulate hand-drawn boxes rather than perfect rectangles.

PaperCard.base: bg-[#FFF9EA] border-2 border-[#D8C8A8] p-6 relative transition-transform rounded-[255px_15px_225px_15px/15px_225px_15px_255px]
PaperCard.notes: Apply a slight rotation (rotate-1 or -rotate-1) randomly on some cards to enhance the draft-y feel.

StickerTag.base: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 bg-white border-2 border-[#2F2A24] rounded-full text-sm font-bold font-nunito text-[#2F2A24] transition-all
StickerTag.notes: Looks like a die-cut sticker. Use vibrant accent colors for the background on hover.

NotebookTab.base: px-6 py-2 rounded-t-lg border-2 border-b-0 border-[#D8C8A8] bg-[#F8F1DF] text-[#8A7D6B] font-fraunces font-bold transition-colors cursor-pointer

StickyNote.base: bg-[#FEF7D2] border border-[#F2B84B]/40 p-4 shadow-sm rotate-2 relative max-w-sm
StickyNote.decoration: Add a pseudo-element or absolute div at the top center for 'washi tape': bg-[#5DADEC]/50 w-12 h-4 -mt-6 -rotate-2

CompanionMessage.base: bg-white border-2 border-[#2F2A24] p-4 rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(47,42,36,1)] mb-4 font-nunito
CompanionMessage.ai_header: flex items-center gap-2 font-fraunces text-sm text-[#A98BD8] mb-2

ImportDropzone.base: border-4 border-dashed border-[#D8C8A8] bg-[#F8F1DF]/50 rounded-2xl p-12 text-center hover:bg-[#FFF9EA] hover:border-[#5DADEC] transition-colors

ExportFolderCard.base: bg-[#F2B84B] border-2 border-[#2F2A24] rounded-t-sm rounded-b-xl p-8 relative shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(47,42,36,1)]
ExportFolderCard.tab: absolute -top-4 left-0 bg-[#F2B84B] border-2 border-b-0 border-[#2F2A24] px-4 py-2 rounded-t-lg

custom_cursor.default: A small, tilted graphite pencil SVG. Pointing top-left.
custom_cursor.hover_interactive: A hand-drawn raccoon paw (for buttons/links) to fit the sample game lore, or a thicker marker.
custom_cursor.drag: A closed raccoon paw holding the object.
custom_cursor.technical_implementation: Hide default cursor via CSS `cursor: none`. Render a fixed-position div following mouse coordinates using framer-motion or standard event listeners. Ensure `pointer-events: none` on the custom cursor.

motion.philosophy: Tactile and snappy, like moving physical cards.
motion.hover: Scale 1.02, rotate slightly, increase offset shadow.
motion.entry: Slight stagger upward fade-in for lists (like laying down cards one by one).

section_layouts.Landing: Hero text centered, large Fraunces font. A stack of slightly rotated PaperCards representing projects. Warm, inviting.
section_layouts.Idea_Page: A blank canvas with dot-grid. Large StickyNotes and text inputs using Caveat for labels, Nunito for input. Looks like a brainstorming wall.
section_layouts.Loop_Sketch: Canvas for a flowchart. Nodes are StickerTags or PaperCards, connected by rough SVG dashed lines with hand-drawn arrows.
section_layouts.Economy_Notes: Split view. Left: Generators (lists). Right: Currencies. Use JetBrains Mono for the math and JSON-like configuration. High density.
section_layouts.Upgrade_Stickers: A loose grid of StickerTags. Visually dense. Some stickers are 'peeling' (hover effect).
section_layouts.Creature_Doodles: Gallery of mascot images and enemy concepts. Cards look like polaroids or index cards clipped to a board.
section_layouts.Asset_Kit: Folder UI. Grid of images. Incorporate washi tape graphics across the corners of the images.
section_layouts.Prototype_Playground: A 'phone-sized' or embedded window card in the center with a mock clicker interface. Surrounded by floating stats in JetBrains Mono.
section_layouts.Export_Folder: A manila folder graphic. Big, chunky 'Pack Kit' button with green (Moss Green) accents.

icons_and_doodles.styling: Use thin stroke-width=1.5 to simulate pencil or ink drawings.
icons_and_doodles.accents: Include inline SVG sketchy doodles (asterisks, dashed underlines, and swirly arrows) as decorative absolute-positioned elements around headings.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case format.

raccoon_mascot.description: Hand-drawn sketchbook style concept art of a cursed muffin raccoon character
raccoon_mascot.usage: Use in Creature Doodles or Asset Kit

bakery_environment.description: Hand-drawn isometric sketch of a magical raccoon bakery
bakery_environment.usage: Use as a background element or hero image in the Asset Kit/Prototype

doodle_assets.description: Sheet of sketchy, hand-drawn UI elements and doodles on warm paper
doodle_assets.usage: Use for extracting visual accents, or display in Asset Kit

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the typography stack strictly. Never use Inter or generic sans for headings. Use Fraunces for headings, Nunito for body, JetBrains Mono for stats/code, and Caveat ONLY for tiny accents/labels.
Do not use Shadcn default looks as-is. Customize components to have wobbly borders (using complex border-radius) and hard pencil/ink shadows instead of soft diffuse shadows.
Include a global custom cursor component using the specifications provided, tracking the mouse pointer and rendering an SVG pencil/paw.
Ensure the background uses a very faint dot-grid texture overlaying the paper color.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the creative layouts rather than rigid Vercel-like cards.
Add 'data-testid' to everything interactive to ensure testability.
Do NOT make the UI look like a children's app. Keep it looking like a professional but eccentric creator's notebook.
